} }

Phone is required

Enter valid 10 digit number

} }

@if (vendorForm.get('businessName')?.touched && vendorForm.get('businessName')?.invalid) {

Business name is required

}

}

Government ID is required

}

📍 Location Details

@if (vendorForm.get('address')?.touched && vendorForm.get('address')?.invalid) {

Address is required

}
@if (vendorForm.get('pincode')?.touched && vendorForm.get('pincode')?.errors) { @if (vendorForm.get('pincode')?.errors?.['required']) {

Pincode is required

} @if (vendorForm.get('pincode')?.errors?.['pattern']) {

Enter valid 6 digit pincode

} }
@if (vendorForm.get('state')?.touched && vendorForm.get('state')?.invalid) {

State is required

}
